BatchGetNamedQuery.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more named queries

BatchGetPreparedStatement.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more prepared statements

BatchGetQueryExecution.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more query executions

CancelCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to cancel a capacity reservation

CancelQueryExecution.description: Grants permission to cancel query execution. Deprecated. Applies only to AWS services and principals that use Athena JDBC driver earlier than 1.1.0. Use StopQueryExecution otherwise

CreateCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to create a capacity reservation

CreateDataCatalog.description: Grants permission to create a datacatalog

CreateNamedQuery.description: Grants permission to create a named query

CreateNotebook.description: Grants permission to create a notebook

CreatePreparedStatement.description: Grants permission to create a prepared statement

CreatePresignedNotebookUrl.description: Grants permission to create a presigned notebook url

CreateWorkGroup.description: Grants permission to create a workgroup

DeleteCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to delete a capacity reservation

DeleteDataCatalog.description: Grants permission to delete a datacatalog

DeleteNamedQuery.description: Grants permission to delete a named query specified

DeleteNotebook.description: Grants permission to delete a notebook

DeletePreparedStatement.description: Grants permission to delete a prepared statement specified

DeleteWorkGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a workgroup

ExportNotebook.description: Grants permission to export a notebook

GetCalculationExecution.description: Grants permission to get a calculation execution

GetCalculationExecutionCode.description: Grants permission to get a calculation execution code

GetCalculationExecutionStatus.description: Grants permission to get a calculation execution status

GetCapacityAssignmentConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get capacity assignment information for a capacity reservation

GetCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to get a capacity reservation

GetCatalogs.description: Grants permission to enable access to databases and tables. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetDataCatalog.description: Grants permission to get a datacatalog

GetDatabase.description: Grants permission to get a database for a given datacatalog

GetExecutionEngine.description: Grants permission to enable access to the specified database and table. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetExecutionEngines.description: Grants permission to enable access to databases and tables. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetNamedQuery.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified named query

GetNamespace.description: Grants permission to enable access to the specified database and table. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetNamespaces.description: Grants permission to enable access to databases and tables. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetNotebookMetadata.description: Grants permission to get notebook metadata

GetPreparedStatement.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified prepared statement

GetQueryExecution.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified query execution

GetQueryExecutions.description: Grants permission to get query executions. Deprecated. Applies only to AWS services and principals that use Athena JDBC driver earlier than 1.1.0. Use ListQueryExecutions otherwise

GetQueryResults.description: Grants permission to get the query results

GetQueryResultsStream.description: Grants permission to get the query results stream

GetQueryRuntimeStatistics.description: Grants permission to get runtime statistics for the specified query execution

GetResourceDashboard.description: Grants permission to get a Live UI/Persistence UI for a session

GetSession.description: Grants permission to get a session

GetSessionEndpoint.description: Grants permission to get a connection endpoint and authentication token for a given session Id

GetSessionStatus.description: Grants permission to get a session status

GetTable.description: Grants permission to enable access to the specified table. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetTableMetadata.description: Grants permission to get a metadata about a table for a given datacatalog

GetTables.description: Grants permission to enable access to tables. Applies only to AWS services managed policy and principals that use an Athena JDBC driver version 1.1.0

GetWorkGroup.description: Grants permission to get a workgroup

ImportNotebook.description: Grants permission to import a notebook

ListApplicationDPUSizes.description: Grants permission to return a list of ApplicationRuntimeIds

ListCalculationExecutions.description: Grants permission to return a list of calculation executions

ListCapacityReservations.description: Grants permission to return a list of capacity reservations for the specified AWS account

ListDataCatalogs.description: Grants permission to return a list of datacatalogs for the specified AWS account

ListDatabases.description: Grants permission to return a list of databases for a given datacatalog

ListEngineVersions.description: Grants permission to return a list of athena engine versions for the specified AWS account

ListExecutors.description: Grants permission to return a list of executors

ListNamedQueries.description: Grants permission to return a list of named queries in Amazon Athena for the specified AWS account

ListNotebookMetadata.description: Grants permission to return a list of notebooks for a given workgroup

ListNotebookSessions.description: Grants permission to return a list of sessions for a given notebook

ListPreparedStatements.description: Grants permission to return a list of prepared statements for the specified workgroup

ListQueryExecutions.description: Grants permission to return a list of query executions for the specified AWS account

ListSessions.description: Grants permission to return a list of sessions for a given workgroup

ListTableMetadata.description: Grants permission to return a list of table metadata in a database for a given datacatalog

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to return a list of tags for a resource

ListWorkGroups.description: Grants permission to return a list of workgroups for the specified AWS account

PutCapacityAssignmentConfiguration.description: Grants permission to assign capacity from a capacity reservation to queries

RunQuery.description: Grants permission to run a query. Deprecated. Applies only to AWS services and principals that use Athena JDBC driver earlier than 1.1.0. Use StartQueryExecution otherwise

StartCalculationExecution.description: Grants permission to start a calculation execution

StartQueryExecution.description: Grants permission to start a query execution using an SQL query provided as a string

StartSession.description: Grants permission to start a session

StopCalculationExecution.description: Grants permission to stop a calculation execution

StopQueryExecution.description: Grants permission to stop the specified query execution

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add a tag to a resource

TerminateSession.description: Grants permission to terminate a session

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag from a resource

UpdateCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to update a capacity reservation

UpdateDataCatalog.description: Grants permission to update a datacatalog

UpdateNamedQuery.description: Grants permission to update a named query specified

UpdateNotebook.description: Grants permission to update a notebook

UpdateNotebookMetadata.description: Grants permission to update notebook metadata

UpdatePreparedStatement.description: Grants permission to update a prepared statement

UpdateWorkGroup.description: Grants permission to update a workgroup

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the the presence of tag keys in the request
